form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Most recently won by 1.2 len at this track Hcp April 4 over 950m in heavy going defeating Impardoo with 61.5kg at $5. Gets out to a longer journey now.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Form hard to fault. Most recently won by 1.2 len at this track Hcp April 4 over 950m in heavy going defeating Impardoo with 61.5kg at $5. Gets out to a longer journey now.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted in marginally near the winning post hampering Highbar.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. First-up ran on strongly from last on the turn; 3rd of 8 at this track Hcp on March 12 over 950m, on a wet track; 0.5 len behind Valenki with 55kg at $5.50. Second-up won by a nose at this track Hcp March 26 over 1250m in the wet defeating Smart Legend carrying 55kg at $5.50. Can go on with the job.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted out momentarily near the 300m inconveniencing Major Artie.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. First-up 5th of 8 at this track Hcp on March 12 over 950m, on heavy track; 0.8 len behind Valenki carrying 55kg at $13. Second run from a spell 6th of 8 at this track Hcp on March 26 over 1250m, on a wet track; 13 len behind Armour Force carrying 55kg at $14. Making headway and is in the mix.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3.5). Third-up today and placed third-up previously. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly in the middle stages.
Taken inwards by Go Getaboy passing the 200m after being contacted.

form.formComment: Resumes. Finished off last campaign won by nose Innisfail Hcp October 18 over 2000m slow track defeating Vivenzo carrying 61kg at $2.40. First up last campaign second last of 10 at Eagle Farm Bm68 March 1 2025 over 1300m, 5.5 len behind Outsmarted with 59.5kg at $17. Stays under notice.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(3.5). Resumes. Finished off last campaign won by nose Innisfail Hcp October 18 over 2000m slow track defeating Vivenzo carrying 61kg at $2.40. First up last campaign second last of 10 at Eagle Farm Bm68 March 1 2025 over 1300m, 5.5 len behind Outsmarted with 59.5kg at $17. Stays under notice.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Laid out under pressure over the concluding stages.
Raced wide in the early and middle stages with cover.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after five months ran last of 9 at Townsville Hcp on March 15 over 1000m, on rain affected going; 6 len behind Roweiner's Dance with 55kg at $41. Previously second-up 2nd of 9 at Townsville Bm60 on March 6 2025 over 1400m, 1.1 len behind Barmera carrying 60kg at $3.70. Looks a fair way off peak form so others are preferred.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3). Second-up. First-up after five months ran last of 9 at Townsville Hcp on March 15 over 1000m, on rain affected going; 6 len behind Roweiner's Dance with 55kg at $41. Previously second-up 2nd of 9 at Townsville Bm60 on March 6 2025 over 1400m, 1.1 len behind Barmera carrying 60kg at $3.70. Looks a fair way off peak form so others are preferred.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly. Checked when tightened for room, near the 100m.
Shifted out at the start bumping heavily with Redwood Shadow and unbalanced.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last preparation third in a small field at Gordonvale Hcp October 4 over 1800m, 2.25 len behind Blue Steel carrying 54.5kg at $2.50. When resuming last campaign fourth of 8 at this track Bm75 February 15 2025 over 1250m, on rain affected going; 3 len behind Inching Closer carrying 57kg at $26. Unlikely to trouble the top few.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up 4th of 16 at Townsville Cl3-Sw on February 27 over 1000m, on a slow track; 1.75 len behind Mind Over Matter carrying 56kg at $16. Second run from a spell ran on from midfield and won by 0.7 len at this track Cl3-Sw March 26 over 1250m in heavy going defeating Alabama Moonlight carrying 58kg at $3. Racing well. Rates well and can go close.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted wider leaving the 800m and raced wide from that point onwards.
